heading: Liquidation of superseded or inactive programs
label: 5317 Liquidation of superseded or inactive programs
text: The Secretary is authorized to transfer the assets and liabilities of any program which is superseded or inactive by reason of this chapter to the revolving fund for liquidating programs established pursuant to title II of the Independent Offices Appropriation Act, 1955 (; , 295) [].Public Law 83–42868 Stat. 27212 U.S.C. 1701g–5
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title I of , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 93–38388 Stat. 633Aug. 22, 1974

Amendments1984— substituted “title II of the Independent Offices Appropriation Act, 1955 (; , 295)” for “title II of the Independent Offices Appropriation Act of 1965 (; , 295)”.Pub. L. 98–479Public Law 83–42868 Stat. 272Public Law 81–42868 Stat. 272
